name: Apple Ads: Recommendations Page (DOM)
description: Extract recommendation-card rows from the Apple Ads portal `Recommendations` page using the authenticated browser session. Use this when the keyword-suggest API endpoint is unavailable or when you need the full recommendation card text (not just keyword suggestions). Read-only.

browser_automation.description: Navigate to the portal shell, click the Recommendations nav, and extract `.rc-card-component.row` rows.

sequences.name: apple_ads_keyword_recommendations
sequences.description: Open the Recommendations page and dump visible cards (or the no-recommendations empty state).

optional_variables.name: adam_id
optional_variables.description: Optional: app adamId, for recipient-side filtering only (this workflow does not apply it).

optional_variables.name: adgroup_id
optional_variables.description: Optional: ad group id for context only.

optional_variables.name: query
optional_variables.description: Optional: seed keyword for context only.

optional_variables.name: storefront
optional_variables.description: Optional: storefront code (us, gb, ca) for context only.

steps.name: Navigate to the Apple Ads portal

help.summary: Extract recommendation-card rows from Apple Ads Recommendations page (authenticated browser session).

parameters.name: adam_id
parameters.description: App adamId — currently only used for caller-side filtering; not applied to the UI.

parameters.name: adgroup_id
parameters.description: Ad group id — caller-side context only.

parameters.name: storefront
parameters.description: Storefront code (us, gb, ca) — caller-side context only.

examples.description: Dump current Recommendations cards for the authenticated org.

help.returns: Array of { title, info, supply_source_title, states_summary, raw_text } summary cards. As of 2026-04, Apple's portal shows category-level summary cards (e.g. 'Keywords — 98 Available, 0 Applied, 0 Dismissed') rather than a flat per-keyword list. Drill into the keyword-suggest workflow for actual keyword data.
notes: Requires an authenticated app-ads.apple.com session in the browser.

Optional params are passed through but do NOT currently filter the portal view — they exist so the caller can tag the result set and filter downstream. If Apple adds a query-string filter for the Recommendations page, wire it into step s1.

Apple changed the layout in 2026-Q1: the page now lists category summary cards (Keywords, Negative Keywords, Bid, etc.) instead of individual recommendations. To get per-keyword recs, click into a category in the portal and use `apple-ads/keyword-suggest` for the actual keyword suggestion data.
`raw_text` is a fallback text blob; prefer title + info + states_summary for clean data.
